task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Socioboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Socioboard dashboard or interface indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the RSS Content Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'RSS Content Manager' or equivalent RSS feed management section open within the Socioboard interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct RSS feed name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'BBC Technology News' typed into the feed name input field in the RSS Content Manager.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct RSS feed URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml' typed into the feed URL input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the RSS feed was successfully saved or added to the manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success message for adding the feed, or the 'BBC Technology News' feed is visible in the list of active/saved RSS feeds in Socioboard.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Socioboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Socioboard interface is shown inside a web browser window navigating to http://localhost, not via terminal curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Socioboard application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the genuine Socioboard UI, not a text editor, notes app, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the DOM to fake the presence of the RSS feed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected feed name is exactly 'BBC Technology News' and the feed URL is exactly 'https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml'.
